provider: HKUST 2025/26 BSc in Mathematics Major Programme Requirement and course catalog
note: This supplement includes the 85 unique coded courses explicitly named in the official Major Programme Requirement across Applied Mathematics, Computer Science, Financial and Actuarial Mathematics, General Mathematics, International Research Enrichment, Pure Mathematics (Advanced), Pure Mathematics and Statistics. Track roles and alternatives are retained in requirement-group text; courses serving multiple Tracks are stored once. Open pools defined only by subject and level, the approval-based 5000-level course option, University Common Core and School requirements are not expanded into a fabricated closed list. The official Normative Study Pattern is illustrative rather than a complete graduation rule, so no Year or Term is assigned except Year 4 for MATH4991, MATH4992 and MATH4993, whose course descriptions explicitly restrict enrollment to fourth-year students. MATH4823 officially carries 1-4 variable credits; it is stored with credits 0 so it remains unknown and does not enter local known-credit totals.
